title: Gate Maintenance, Upgrades, Metrics, and Capstone · Gate Lens: Tool Upgrades
summary: Operate a reusable repository template without letting gates rot or overwhelm contributors. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates tool upgrades increment in a reusable quality-gated repository template. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Schedule compatibility-tested tool and runtime upgrades with rollback paths.
Measure defect escape, false positives, duration, flakiness, suppression age, and developer friction.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
